Defines a linting rule to encourage the use of `applib_malloc` for exported structures.

# Purpose
This XML rule defines a pattern for identifying specific function names in the codebase that match the regular expression `\b(task_|app_)?[cmz]alloc(_check)?`. The rule assigns an ID `applib_malloc` and categorizes the severity as `style`. The summary advises developers to use `applib_malloc` for exported structures and provides guidance to consult Bradley Murray for further questions.
